title: helichrysum alucense
intro: Helichrysum alucense, also known as Mountain Everlast or Alucense, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum alucense include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum alucense can be prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
